claims.summary: Rescue-policy rejection can interrupt the otherwise steady semantic heartbeat.
claims.disposition: Verified bounded status evidence records every admitted or blocked attempt, block reason, skip rate, pressure context, phase, and signal texture without changing rescue behavior.

claims.summary: Heartbeat texture should be compared with phase and the observed Shadow/Minime trajectory.
claims.disposition: Verified current side-by-side signal/texture evidence and routed a bounded phase-specific fixture for the remaining trajectory comparison; no causal fit is inferred.

claims.summary: A pulse admitted by rescue policy may still wait or fail at the sensory channel, producing an unmeasured continuity gap.
claims.disposition: Implemented semantic_heartbeat_delivery_health_v1 after the actual channel send, recording enqueue success/closure, queue wait, and inter-enqueue gaps while preserving cadence and dispatch behavior.

claims.summary: craft_warmth_vector should accept live Shadow influence so pulse weight follows the Shadow trajectory.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because coupling Shadow into the vector changes live sensory content, gain, and autonomous behavior.
